name: 14K Pawn & Exchange
description_short: 14K Pawn & Exchange is a pawn shop in Berkley, MI offering collateral-based loans, buying/selling of jewelry, electronics, tools, and other items with competitive pricing.
description_long:
14K Pawn & Exchange operates as a traditional pawn shop located at 28975 Woodward Avenue in Berkley, Michigan. The business has built its reputation around fast cash transactions and collateral-based lending for customers in the greater Detroit metropolitan area. Their tagline "We Pay More...Guaranteed!" reflects their positioning as a competitive buyer in the local pawn market.

The shop offers a broad range of services centered on buying, selling, and lending against collateral. Their inventory includes gold, diamonds, jewelry, coins, electronics, phones, tools, computers, watches, and antiques. Customers can obtain quick collateral loans without traditional credit checks, sell items for cash, or purchase discounted merchandise from their inventory. The business also maintains an eBay store for online sales and accepts walk-in customers during posted business hours (Monday-Saturday, 11 AM-6 PM; closed Sundays).

What distinguishes 14K Pawn & Exchange is their emphasis on customer service and staff expertise. Multiple customer reviews specifically praise individual staff members by name (Tony, Joe, Frank), highlighting fair pricing, courteous service, and competitive loan terms. The company positions itself as offering "the most reasonable and affordable rates in town" and claims to pay top dollar for precious metals and valuables. Their integration of an eBay sales channel suggests operational sophistication beyond typical small pawn operations.

As a pawn shop, 14K Pawn & Exchange serves customers seeking immediate cash without credit evaluation, but borrowers should understand that pawn loans require surrendering physical collateral and typically carry higher effective costs than traditional lending. The business model is straightforward and transparent—loan terms are negotiated based on item value—but customers must be comfortable with potentially losing items if loans aren't repaid.
pros: Staff named in customer reviews (Tony, Joe, Frank) suggesting consistent, personalized service
Competitive pricing explicitly marketed with "We Pay More...Guaranteed!" promise
Broad inventory across jewelry, electronics, tools, coins, watches, and antiques
eBay store presence indicating additional sales channels and operational reach
Fast cash availability without credit checks or lengthy approval processes
Collateral-based loans allow borrowing for those with poor credit history
Convenient location on Woodward Avenue in Berkley with accessible business hours
cons: Pawn loans require surrendering physical collateral with risk of permanent loss if unpaid
Limited transparency on website about specific loan terms, APR, or repayment timelines
Effective cost of borrowing through pawns typically higher than personal or installment loans
No indication of financial counseling or alternatives offered to customers
Closed on Sundays, limiting access for some potential customers
best_for: Individuals needing immediate cash ($500-$5,000+) who own valuable items and prefer quick approval
People with poor or no credit history unable to qualify for traditional loans
Bargain hunters seeking discounted jewelry, electronics, and collectibles
Sellers of used items (jewelry, tools, electronics) looking for quick conversion to cash
diagnosis: 14K Pawn & Exchange is best for consumers who own valuable items, need cash urgently, and have limited access to traditional credit. The main caveat is that pawn lending carries the risk of losing collateral if the loan cannot be repaid, and effective borrowing costs are substantially higher than conventional personal loans or lines of credit.
services: Computer and phone buying and selling
meta_description: 14K Pawn & Exchange in Berkley, MI offers collateral-based loans and buys/sells jewelry, electronics, tools, and merchandise.
